title: CG 2010
text: Home * Conferences * Computer and Games 2010 < Prev Next > The 7th International Computers and Games Conference , JAIST , Kanazawa , Japan , September 24-26, 2010 , in conjunction with the 15th Computer Olympiad , the 18th World Computer Chess Championship , and the First World Chess Software Championship .
